task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the correct patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the patient name 'Pedro Gusikowski' and DOB '2011-04-05' displayed in the application's patient dashboard or demographic view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the guarantor's name is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Maria' and 'Gusikowski' entered into the Guarantor First Name and Last Name fields, or a combined Guarantor Name field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the guarantor's relationship to the patient is specified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Parent' selected in a dropdown menu or entered into a text field labeled 'Relationship' or 'Guarantor Relationship'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the guarantor's address is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '661 Nikolaus Well' in the street field, 'Northampton' in the city field, 'MA' (or Massachusetts) in the state field, and '01060' in the zip code field within the Guarantor section.

task_completion.description: Verify that the guarantor's phone number is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '(413) 555-0198' (or a similar format like 413-555-0198) in the Guarantor Phone or Contact field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the guarantor information has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message (e.g., 'Saved', 'Updated successfully') or the newly entered guarantor information displayed in a non-editable summary view of the patient's record.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application GUI to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual web application interface (e.g., an EMR/EHR system) with form fields being filled, not a terminal or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just type the target information into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the specific patient management software's guarantor form, not a generic text editor like Notepad, TextEdit, or a blank browser page.

integrity.description: Verify the save action was performed within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the application's native save button being clicked or a native confirmation message, rather than a mocked or edited screen.
